programmes.show_description: BBC Radio Ulster joins BBC Radio 5 live.
The day's news agenda set with Sarah Brett and Chris Buckler, including regular news, travel and sport updates and analysis of finance and business news.
An essential roundup of local news, sport and weather across the north west of Northern Ireland.

Anne-Marie brings you a lively selection of music this Easter Tuesday. Music from Maximo Park, Ed Sheeran and Blondie. An easy guess who's on the Set List tonight...
A busy night of action in the Sports Direct Irish Premiership. All 12 teams play as the race for the Gibson Cup and the battle to avoid relegation hots up.
